**Welcome to the first official release of My Workouts!** рҹҸӢпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ
A distraction-free, premium fitness tracker designed to help you log your heavy lifts and watch your strength grow.
## вңЁ Key Features
 * **Premium Design:** Sleek iOS-style frosted glass UI, adaptive Light/Dark mode, and cinematic custom animations.
 * **Smart Scheduling:** Build custom workout days, reorder your week seamlessly, and personalize with background images.
 * **Track Your Progress:** Log sets and reps on the fly, and view your personal records with auto-generated charts.
 * **100% Private & Offline:** Zero accounts required. Includes built-in data backup and restore directly to your device.
